title: Freeze Columns in View
excerpt: It would be nice if we could freeze columns, so they would remain in view when we use the horizontal scrollbar.

posts.author: Chris (Chris Policastro)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice if we could freeze columns, so they would remain in view when we use the horizontal scrollbar.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Chris Freezing Columns is now available.
https://community.monday.com/t/pinning-a-second-column/578

Freezing Columns & Changing Width Feature requests
We would like the ability to freeze some columns besides the first pulse. Normally we will write in the problem and have the second column be the machine that is having issues. When you scroll over you can see the machine anymore. Being able to freeze the columns would be super helpful. Along the same lines, being able to have wrap text would also be really cool.

If you cannot see the pin icon, contact support@monday.com and ask for it to be added to your account.

posts.author: Chris (Chris Policastro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday.com,

This is great news. When will this be available for use? I don’t see it on my columns now.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Chris

It’s available now, but apparently you may need to ask for it to be added to your account.

Email support@monday.com

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: @Chris I will add this to your account now!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I checked and it’s actually already on your account. You can choose which columns to pin using this dropdown:
